patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 1's negative-edge discipline holds even on today's best pre-cap stack (BOS @ CHW, pre-cap A- with a triple F-signal): small negative edges on elite stacks have punished chasers repeatedly this season (BAL@LAD -4.27pp lost 12-1 on 6/21, COL@OAK -17.48pp lost 23-9 on 6/14) — confirming SKIP over the qualitative temptation to chase Schultz's edge.

COL @ LAD repeats yesterday's (7/6) exact pipeline miss on the identical matchup: pick_prob clears the >0.80 HARD CAP 9 threshold two days running (0.8766 then 0.8681) but grade_reasons never tags CAP 9, only CAP 7. Manually applying CAP 9's intent on consecutive days points to a real rule-engine bug worth a pipeline fix, not just a recurring Claude override.

LAA @ TEX (PLATINUM, pick_prob=0.781) stacks Stage 1/2 disagreement (Δ=0.14) with confidence_downgrade and acute_roster — short of the literal 0.80 CAP 9 cutoff but inside the same top-bucket calibration-hallucination pattern (archive: 33% actual vs 87% predicted) that has burned PLATINUM picks all season (~43% historical hit rate); downgrading on the qualitative combination.
The postgame archive has a 16-day gap (last file 2026-06-21, none 6/22-7/6) — every lesson cited today is running roughly two weeks stale, the same gap flagged in yesterday's (7/6) run.

Five of fifteen games (MIL@STL, SEA@MIA, KC@NYM, PHI@CIN, TOR@SF) remain PENDING_SP_DATA at diag time; the protocol correctly withholds a directional commitment on all five pending probable-pitcher announcements.

CHC @ BAL.reasoning: Thin signal stack: only Stage 1/2 agreement (Δ=0.00) supports CHC, while PQI runs against the pick (late-game-degradation Δ=+13.2). Edge is a negligible +0.19pp and HARD CAP 10 correctly holds this in the bottom bucket (pick_prob=0.528) with no CONFIRM rescue justified — archive shows non-CONFIRM picks in this band hit just 31.2%. No live news changes that read. Confirming SKIP.

OAK @ DET.reasoning: F1*(1.22, starred)+F3(1664.9) corroborate, and SP edge (0.81 xERA, Skubal over Ginn) and PQI (+8.7) both support DET, but the -10.52pp negative edge falls in the range that has repeatedly punished chased GOLD picks this season (BAL@LAD -4.27pp lost 12-1 on 6/21, COL@OAK -17.48pp lost 23-9 on 6/14). Stage 1/2 disagree (Δ=0.16, DET fades from 75.7% F5 to 54.7% full) adds carry-thesis caution. HARD CAP 10 stacks on top. Confirming the cap-suppressed SKIP.

ATL @ PIT.reasoning: Pre-cap B+ (score=3): moderate F3 (771, below the ~2000 high-conviction floor), PQI confirms (+18.4), Stage 1/2 agree. HARD CAP 1 correctly fires on the -9.98pp negative edge — this discipline has been validated repeatedly (BAL@LAD, COL@OAK, TB@LAA all lost when a similar edge was chased), then HARD CAP 10 stacks on the bottom-bucket pick_prob. Skenes gives PIT a real quality gap but the market has already priced it. Confirming SKIP.

NYY @ TB.reasoning: Grade computes to A (SP edge 0.71 xERA, PQI +12.2, Stage 1/2 agree Δ=0.01) but the pipeline's own tier holds SKIP, consistent with bullpen_fatigue and confidence_downgrade flags plus a starred F1 (1.03*) with no F3 corroboration — the archive treats F1*-alone as an unreliable lead signal requiring caution (validated 6/12-6/14). No live news overrides that. Confirming the model's own SKIP despite the high raw grade.

HOU @ WSH.reasoning: SP edge (0.83 xERA) and PQI (+8.7) both support WSH with clean Stage 1/2 agreement (Δ=0.03), but edge is essentially flat (-0.32pp), triggering HARD CAP 1, then HARD CAP 10 on the bottom-bucket pick_prob (0.528). This reads as a near-coin-flip with no actionable edge either direction. Confirming SKIP.

CLE @ MIN.reasoning: No F-signal fires; PQI runs against the pick (late-game-degradation Δ=-3.5) while Stage 1/2 agree only loosely (Δ=0.07). HARD CAP 10 holds the bottom-bucket pick_prob (0.527) at score 0. This is a thin, unsupported pick with a genuine opposing signal (PQI) — consistent with the archive's weak-stack pattern that runs close to coin-flip. Confirming SKIP.

BOS @ CHW.reasoning: The strongest pre-cap stack on the slate (pre-cap A-, score=4): F1=3.12 (not starred), F3=7787.7, F5_bullpen=+0.65 all fire, SP edge 2.29 xERA (Schultz) and PQI (-33.5) both confirm, Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.02). But HARD CAP 1 fires on the -2.32pp negative edge, then HARD CAP 10 stacks. Even small negative edges on elite pre-cap stacks have punished chasers repeatedly this season (BAL@LAD -4.27pp lost 12-1 on 6/21, COL@OAK -17.48pp lost 23-9 on 6/14) — the market has already absorbed Schultz's edge. Confirming SKIP despite the strong qualitative case.
lessons_applied: CAP1 non-negotiable even on elite triple-F stacks (BAL@LAD 6/21, COL@OAK 6/14)

LAA @ TEX.reasoning: deGrom's 0.90 xERA edge and PQI (+10.6) genuinely support TEX, but Stage 1/2 disagree by 0.14 (F5 63.6% vs full 78.1%) with confidence_downgrade=True and acute_roster stress already triggered HARD CAP 4 (score 3->1). PLATINUM has run ~43% historically, and pick_prob=0.781 sits just under the CAP 9 top-bucket cutoff where the archive shows 33% actual vs 87% predicted hit rates — the same calibration-hallucination smell even without formally tripping CAP 9. Downgrading to SKIP.

ARI @ SD.reasoning: No F-signal and no SP-xERA dimension in grade_reasons — only team_quality and loose Stage 1/2 agreement (Δ=0.06) support ARI, a pattern the archive flags as a vulnerable stack prone to blowup losses (SD@BAL 6/13, lost 9-3). HARD CAP 10 holds this at score 0 despite the +10.96pp edge sitting in-band. No qualitative signal changes the read. Confirming SKIP.
lessons_applied: grade lacking SP-xERA dimension is a vulnerable stack (SD@BAL 6/13)

COL @ LAD.reasoning: Same matchup, same problem as yesterday (7/6 COL@LAD, pick_prob=0.8766): pick_prob=0.868 clears the HARD CAP 9 top-bucket threshold (>0.80, archive 33% actual vs 87% predicted) but grade_reasons only shows HARD CAP 7 firing (pick-side bullpen disadvantage, hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.025, a rule validated 0-for-7 in backtest) — CAP 9 never triggers on this recurring matchup, the same pipeline miss as yesterday. Applying CAP 9's intent manually alongside the already-fired CAP 7. Downgrading to SKIP.
lessons_applied: CAP9 pipeline miss recurring on COL@LAD (7/6, 7/7)

MIL @ STL.reasoning: STL's home SP is not yet announced at diag time; PENDING_SP_DATA protocol correctly withholds a directional commitment since there is no Statcast xERA sample to score. No lineup or injury news changes this. Confirming no pick.
lessons_applied: PENDING_SP_DATA protocol validated across the season
